procedure.name: Atomic Red Team validation for T1568.001
procedure.description: Automated emulation procedure for T1568.001 executed via Invoke-AtomicRedTeam inside the Metatron lab environment.

command: Import-Module '/opt/invoke-atomicredteam/Invoke-AtomicRedTeam.psd1' -ErrorAction Stop; $env:PathToAtomicsFolder='/opt/atomic-red-team/atomics'; try { Invoke-AtomicTest T1568 -PathToAtomicsFolder '/opt/atomic-red-team/atomics' -GetPrereqs -ErrorAction Continue } catch { Write-Host '[WARN] GetPrereqs failed for T1568'; }; Invoke-AtomicTest T1568 -PathToAtomicsFolder '/opt/atomic-red-team/atomics'
runs.stdout:

osquery.name: t1568_001_c2_sockets
osquery.query_text: SELECT p.pid, p.name, p.path, p.cmdline, s.remote_address, s.remote_port, s.state FROM process_open_sockets s JOIN processes p ON s.pid = p.pid WHERE s.remote_address != '' AND s.remote_address != '127.0.0.1' AND s.remote_address != '::1' AND s.state = 'ESTABLISHED' LIMIT 100;

osquery.name: t1568_001_dns_cache
osquery.query_text: SELECT pid, fd, socket, remote_address, remote_port FROM process_open_sockets WHERE remote_port = 53 LIMIT 50;
